{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Cassias Arelius
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
| name = Naru Cassias Arelius
| aliases = Cassias, Cassias Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Patriarch of the Arelius family, heir to the Arelius family, Highgold, second-ranked Highgold in the Empire, Truegold
| abilities = bloodline powers, sword madra, Silver Step technique, expanded spiritual sense
| affiliations = Arelius family, Naru clan
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Naru Cassias Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Naru]] Cassias Arelius is a high-ranking member of the [[Arelius family]], a prominent lineage known for their [[sacred arts]] and bloodline abilities. Originally born to be the Patriarch and serving as the heir to the [[Blackflame]] branch of his family, he eventually relinquished his position to [[Eithan]] Arelius. Despite this change in status, Cassias remains a highly skilled practitioner who has advanced to the rank of [[Truegold]]. He is characterized by his impeccable conduct, disciplined nature, and a preoccupation with maintaining an organized and beautiful appearance, often seen meticulously grooming himself or his silver [[Goldsign]] bracer. In his role within the family and the empire, Cassias has demonstrated significant leadership and protective capabilities. He has acted as a scout, utilizing his expanded spiritual senses and bloodline powers to monitor surroundings and identify threats. During times of crisis, such as the displacement of family members due to regional conflicts, he has managed large groups of refugees and worked to ensure their safety. He is married to [[Naru]] [[Jing]], a prominent figure in the [[Naru clan]]. Throughout his experiences, Cassias has maintained a complex relationship with [[Eithan]], balancing respect for his talent with frustration regarding his unpredictable and often secretive nature.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru]] Cassias Arelius, a [[Highgold]] and the former heir to the [[Arelius family]], traveled alongside [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] while dressed in silver-stitched blue silk and a silver bracer. As a [[sword]] artist and genius of his house, he utilized his silver-lighted core to power [[scripts]] and manage various control panels, including those for the [[Striker Trial]] and [[Sky's Mercy]]. During his duties, he demonstrated the ability to inject silver-speckled [[madra]] and empower spears with his [[sword madra]]. Despite being born to be the [[Arelius Patriarch]], he experienced physical exhaustion that left his limbs trembling and his soul numb after depleting his [[madra]]. He is the cousin of [[Eithan]] and a father to a three-year-old son, with a wife from the imperial [[Naru clan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is a member of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is [[Eithan]]'s cousin.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias has gold hair like fresh wheat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias wears a silver bracer on his right forearm.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias wears deep blue silk shirt and pants stitched with silver thread.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is traveling with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias operates a control panel for a training course.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias can inject [[madra]] speckled with silver.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias mentions the cost of a pill is about five thousand scales.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] took Cassias' advice to stay out of the barn during landing.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias can activate a collection script to power the house.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias Arelius is an Arelius and walked away from the control board of [[Sky's Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias was born to be Patriarch of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias works at a control panel.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias has bloodline powers.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias's voice was weak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias follows [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias felt a fist clench his gut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is a [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is a genius of the [[Arelius family]] and its heir.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias Arelius is a member of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias Arelius uses [[madra]] to power [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias Arelius has a core that usually shines silver with the light of [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias's full name is [[Naru Cassias Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias felt his soul was numb and his limbs were trembling after exhausting his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias runs the [[Striker Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias can empower spears with his [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias did not expect [[Eithan]] back for weeks.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is the father of a three-year-old son.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias's wife is a member of the imperial [[Naru clan]] and is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Cassias is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Cassias Arelius]] is a former heir to the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Cassias Arelius]] is an Arelius.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The second-ranked [[Highgold]] in the Empire, [[Naru]] Cassias Arelius, traveled to [[Sky's Mercy]] for the purpose of retrieving [[Lindon]]. During a fall, he was positioned over the shoulder of a female character and utilized the [[Silver Step]] technique. While being led by a [[Skysworn]], the injured Cassias was able to identify a [[Truegold]] on a map. Following his injuries, he remained covered in bandages with a frog's tongue stuck to his wrist. It is also noted that he previously served as a trainer for [[Yerin]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias is coming to [[Sky's Mercy]] to retrieve [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias is the second-ranked [[Highgold]] in the Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias uses the [[Silver Step]] technique.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias was over the shoulder of a female character during a fall.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias is an injured individual being led by a [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias can point out a [[Truegold]] on a map.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias is covered in bandages and has a frog's tongue stuck to his wrist.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Cassias trained [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While waiting for [[Lindon]]'s team at [[Starsweep Tower]], the [[Truegold]] Cassias Arelius displayed blond hair similar to [[Eithan]]'s and carried a thin, silver [[sword]] at his hip. As a [[Truegold]] with expanded spiritual sense and bloodline powers, he also possessed a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]. Upon the group's arrival, Cassias and his wife moved forward to greet them. Later, he could be found standing at the railing, taking shots at enemies in the distance.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias Arelius was waiting for [[Lindon]]'s team at [[Starsweep Tower]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias Arelius has blond hair similar to [[Eithan]]'s.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias Arelius carries a thin, silver [[sword]] at his hip.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias Arelius is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias has expanded spiritual sense and bloodline powers.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias possesses a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias and his wife moved to greet the group.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Cassias was standing at the railing taking shots at distant enemies.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Cassias Arelius is the son of [[Gaien Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Cassias has the ability to see more than anyone else can.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Cassias is a character who stood with [[Lindon]] overlooking the exodus from the [[Nethergate]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Cassias Arelius appeared next to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“On my name as an Arelius, I will send protection for you when you return to your home.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“How did they offend you, for you to make them suffer so?” Cassias asked, his voice weak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Arelius family]]
[[Category:Naru clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
